principle: Each surface has a DIFFERENT independence construction + honesty tier; they are PRESERVED, never averaged into a single accuracy. The binding constraint of the project (a free independent measured-phenotype label) is broken across bacteria AND TB; SARS-CoV-2/influenza/fungal cells are no-free-source or in-distribution; learned-embedding expansion is a closed 0-for-4 negative (see wiki/negative_results_map_2026-06-13.md).

surfaces.independence: BioSample/GCA disjoint vs CRyPTIC + tuning cohorts; measured wet-lab AST (non-circular); E.coli/Salmonella/Klebsiella/Shigella 0.83–0.995 acc
BioSample-resolution-checked (ENA-side biosample-grade; NCBI-side 0/30 cross-archive); RAW headline (homoplasy -> lineage is disclosure); measured AST
surfaces.summary: RIF acc 0.937; ISO acc 0.914 (N~2,845, full cohort)

surfaces.independence: PhenoSense fold-change is NOT HIVDB's own Sierra interpretation (non-circular)

external clinical re-validation of the frozen decoder; strict-tier is the primary metric, relaxed secondary; raw sens/spec is clonality-inflated — see the cluster-weighted block. Separate from the frozen decoder report card.
